title: blue cobweb outline
description: Add blue outline + blue cobweb block
body:
# Choose Your Cobweb Style

Select the cobweb style you want. Currently available options:

- **Blue Outline + Block**
- **Red Outline + Block** [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/red-cobweb-outline)
- **White Outline Only** [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/white-cobweb-outline)

# Why This Resource Pack Helps in PVP

This pack improves gameplay by:

- **Showing cobweb boundaries clearly** so you don’t accidentally get stuck.  
- **Making cobwebs easier to see** in dark or tricky areas.  
- **Helping you navigate faster** without slowing down.  
- **Giving a visual edge** to spot traps or obstacles quickly.
